title: Search functionality with valid input
preconditions: The app is launched and the search screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the search bar labeled 'Area or Zipcode'. | Type 'New York' into the search bar. | Press the enter key to perform the search.
expected_result: The app should display a list of restaurants in New York based on the user's input.

title: Search functionality with invalid input
preconditions: The app is launched and the search screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the search bar labeled 'Area or Zipcode'. | Type an empty string into the search bar. | Press the enter key to perform the search.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that a valid input is required.

title: Search functionality with special characters
preconditions: The app is launched and the search screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the search bar labeled 'Area or Zipcode'. | Type 'New York City' into the search bar. | Press the enter key to perform the search.
expected_result: The app should display a list of restaurants in New York City based on the user's input.

title: Search functionality with numeric input
preconditions: The app is launched and the search screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the search bar labeled 'Area or Zipcode'. | Type '10001' into the search bar. | Press the enter key to perform the search.
expected_result: The app should display a list of restaurants in the ZIP code 10001 based on the user's input.

title: Search functionality with invalid numeric input
preconditions: The app is launched and the search screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the search bar labeled 'Area or Zipcode'. | Type '10001a' into the search bar. | Press the enter key to perform the search.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that a valid ZIP code is required.
